message:
🐛 Fix keyboard input in dialogs and key state errors (#102)

- _handleKeyEvent now returns KeyEventResult instead of void
- Only returns 'handled' for keys we actually process (arrows, enter,
  backspace, D key) — all other keys return 'ignored'
- Fixes Flutter 'physical key already pressed' exceptions caused by
  returning handled for unprocessed keys
- Also skip key handling when ModalRoute.isCurrent is false (dialog open)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
